title: SuperSMP Pack
description: This is for the Minecraft Server SuperSMP and if you want even for Singeplayer
body:
![https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1382](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e5234712d32562be999b307b425ca6286f4b8e_0.webp)

Like the Summary says it's for the Minecraft Server SuperSMP with the ip-address: supersmp.fun

The Store link is [Here](https://store.supersmp.fun/)

The Modpack has 2 Shaders: BSL and Makeup-UltraFast

The Modpack has 15 Mods: Architectury, Balm, Bookshelf, Carry On, Chat Heads, Clumps, Collective, Comforts, Corpse, Enchantment Description, Falling Leaves, Fast Furnace, FTB Library, GeckoLib, Iris Shaders, Iron Chests, Jade, JourneyMap, Just Enough Items (JEI), Macaw's Bridges, Placebo, Prickle, Sodium, Storage Drewers and Waystones

The BSL Shader makes Water Realistic and the MakeUp-UltraFast Shader makes it even for LowEndPC's able to play Minecraft with Shaders

Chat Heads shows when you press Tab the Heads of the Players Skin left of his Name. Clumps reduces Lagging by combining xp, Enchantment Description shows an Description of every Enchantment, Falling Leaves makes Leaves fall but they will only be fall as mod and the Leave Block will be flying until the Tree is complete despawned, Iris Shaders makes it able to play With Shaders, Jade shows the Item/Block were your Hitbox is looking at and if you look to an enchanted item it shows the Enchants combined with Enchantment Description it shows the Description of every Enchantment too, Just Enough Items (JEI) Is an Mod were you can see how you can craft the Item/Block and if you play with Mods that adds Blocks/Items it will show them too, JourneyMap is an Mapping Mod were you can see Mobs and Players even Buildings and Caves, Waystones makes it able to Teleport with just an Waystone that can be Crafted, Macaw*s Bridges adds like it says Bridges.

And if you want to listen to music while playing the SuperSMP Pack heres [a Spotify Playlist](https://open.spotify.com/playlist/7iKPVi8p8bzXe9DXV3CI7i?si=126e5a2e34bb4522)

And Here you can join [the Discord](https://discord.com/invite/supersmp)

The Server didnt Said i have to do this but i wanted to so everyone can See the Server with different eyes.
